hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts && "$FILE" != *.docs.ts && "$FILE" != *.dto.ts ]] && grep -nE '^\s*/\*\*' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '@deprecated' | head -1 | grep -q '.'; then echo '⚠️  WARNING: Use // comments, not /** */ JSDoc style. Only /** @deprecated */ is allowed.' >&2; fi; exit 0
